findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Repeated page header/footer content in HTML
findings.evidence: The following text blocks repeat 3+ times, likely page headers/footers that should not appear in the body: 'community and destination zev infrastructure program' (6x); 'daq grant management system (gms)' (5x).

findings.description: The hyperlink on the word 'here' for the application checklist (PDF page 11) is lost in the HTML. The PDF displays 'here' as a clickable blue hyperlink pointing to the checklist resource, but the HTML renders it as plain text with no anchor tag.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 11: 'The application checklist can be found here.' where 'here' is a blue hyperlink. HTML: '
  • The application checklist can be found here.
    • ' with no tag.

findings.description: The 'Downloadable GMS External User Manual' list item includes an extraneous bullet character '•' inside the anchor tag text. The PDF does not include this literal bullet character in the link text; it is a slide formatting bullet that was incorrectly incorporated into the text content.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 19: '• Downloadable GMS External User Manual' (bullet is slide formatting). HTML: '
  • • Downloadable GMS External User Manual
    • ' — the '•' is now part of the anchor text inside an
  • that already renders its own bullet, and the link is split into two separate tags.
